tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: Simple and easy to play on acoustic guitar. Have fun and play with variations of the chords once you're comfortable.

content:
Artist: Drake White
Song: Back to Free
[ch]Cadd2[/ch] - X32033
[ch]G[/ch]     - 320033


[Intro]

[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd2[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd2[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                          [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
Where’d that dirt face, bare foot, rebel kid go[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
He’s still crawdad fishin’ at the waterin’ hole[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
I must’ve turned eighteen and drove away[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
After all these years I’m finding my way[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                             
Oh, back to climbin’ up that old oak tree[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
Back into the mud underneath my feet[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]
Back to a simpler state of mind, [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
An easier life, Lord an easier time[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Bottle rocket - blackcat – firefly, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd2[/ch]
A plywood ramp stacked three bricks high[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
Back to real, back to me[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
Oh back to free, like we used to be[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
You and me, let’s get back to free[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
How the hell did we wind up here, [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
Self-medicated in a lazy chair?[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
All set for dying, locked in our homes, [/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                                  [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
Nobody’s talking but we’re all on the phone[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab] [ch]G[/ch]
Back to climbin’ up that old oak tree[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd2[/ch]
Back into the mud underneath my feet[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Back to a simpler state of mind, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd2[/ch]
an easier life lord an easier time[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                        
Bottle rocket - blackcat – firefly, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd2[/ch]
A plywood ramp stacked three bricks high[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
Back to real, back to me[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
Oh back to free, like we used to be[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
You and me, let’s get back to free[/tab]


[Instrumental]

[ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd2[/ch] *2x


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                              
Rope swing;   main street;   pregnancy scare[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd2[/ch]
Fast lane;   insane;   driving impaired[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Empty pockets; sweet lover’s lane; [/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd2[/ch]
The county is dry so let it rain[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Short fuse;   good news,   plants were tall[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd2[/ch]
A negative Tess, that old Johnny law[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
We had nothing, we had it all[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
We were free, like we used to be[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Cadd2[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd2[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
You and me, let’s get back to free[/tab]


[Outro]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                          [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
Where’d that dirt face, bare foot, rebel kid go[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
He’s still rawdad fishin’ at the waterin’ hole[/tab]
